subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath been fulfilled, and He Who was promised calleth the servants unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Say: He hath appeared by command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و الموعود یدع العباد الی الله المهیمن القیوم قل انه ظهر بامر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
